programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew's mine site is swamped after a brutal storm; Ryan collapses in a deadly heatwave; Russell and Shane uncover a big nugget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wild Fish
programme.desc: Time is running out as the team must return to the Fraser River to find and tag the 300-pound giant white sturgeon they are looking for; ...

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A violent attack happened to a tribesman in the Bolivian jungle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Biggest & Baddest
programme.desc: One of the largest, heaviest birds in the world, the cassowary is territorial with a reputation for killing people; in Queensland, Niall discovers a small group of cassowaries clinging to life after human development destroyed its environment.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: When a willful teenager takes her father's sloop out alone, Hobo must rescue her.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo foils a criminal plot by disrupting a fox hunt.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: After Dr. Keri's ultrasound indicates that the Sheltie, Mimic, is pregnant, the show follows the puppies' progress from birth to four weeks old.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Breeder Kerry Nemet prepares a litter of Shetland Sheepdog puppies for their future lives.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at what it takes to run the Taronga Zoo Sydney, Australia's largest zoo, located on the shores of Sydney Harbour.

programme.title: My Pet Ate What?
programme.desc: Dr. G investigates an elderly Siamese cat with worrisome sniffles. A serial foreign body offender lands on Dr. Heather Suttie's case list. A sassy mini pony with an insatiable appetite deals the Westwinds Mobile Veterinary Services team a hidden surprise.

programme.title: My Pet Ate What?
programme.desc: Dr. G tackles a barbecue gobble that has more than a kernel of risk. Dr. Heather Suttie faces a potentially toxic situation when a cat goes way beyond a recommended dose. Westwinds Mobile Veterinary Services expands the scope of their large animal horse care.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: When a willful teenager takes her father's sloop out alone, Hobo must rescue her.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo foils a criminal plot by disrupting a fox hunt.

programme.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programme.desc: As the mackerel season begins in Newfoundland; the fishermen want a piece of the action; Skipper Donald Spence has just bought a new boat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programme.sub-title: One Man's Guts, Another Man's Gold
programme.desc: Skipper Lee Pon and the Jacob Louisa hunt for herring; on their final trip of the season, the Crewshell Chill hunts for cod for the first time in more than 20 years.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programme.desc: Success eludes Lee Pond and the Jacob Louisa, as they struggle to find herring against humpbacks and a supermoon; the Sebastian Sails is plagued by equipment failures and a sonar blackout.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A tiny marsupial in the form of a carnivorous chuditch starts to be problematic at feeding time; seven Asian elephants and their enclosure receive a thorough cleaning and they certainly make their presence known.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: A warden follows the trail to locate a mysterious group of hunters; when a warden draws a coveted mule deer hunting tag, he makes memories to last a lifetime; wardens have to ask some tough questions when a large pile of wasted game birds is found.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: New super team the Gold Devils set their sights on a record-breaking 1000 oz total; a gold drought causes one member of the Poseidon Crew to question his future; the Gold Retrievers gamble on a new wash plant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Gold Devils move their multi-million-dollar operation in search of big gold; new team Vince, Bibi and Murray break ground on their dream lease; Jacqui and Andrew return to Australia's wildest gold field, The Palmer River.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: The fishing season could end at any moment and tensions are at an all-time high.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A con man tries to flimflam the wealthy citizens of a small town, but Hobo thwarts his escapades.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: The life of a scrapyard foreman's son is saved when Hobo intervenes.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: A warden follows the trail to locate a mysterious group of hunters; when a warden draws a coveted mule deer hunting tag, he makes memories to last a lifetime; wardens have to ask some tough questions when a large pile of wasted game birds is found.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Following the journey of an underweight and vulnerable little penguin through her progression from tiny to mighty; Brian and Security Steve determine what triggered the monitoring systems that protect Taronga's fence lines.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The fleet looks to prevent the Fishin' Frenzy from securing its fifth title.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A con man tries to flimflam the wealthy citizens of a small town, but Hobo thwarts his escapades.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: The life of a scrapyard foreman's son is saved when Hobo intervenes.

programme.title: A Cut Above
programme.desc: The carvers create and race cars, while the Master Carve pairs them up in a team challenge; they must work together or face the axe.

programme.title: A Cut Above
programme.desc: As the challenges grow more difficult, the carvers test their resilience with a jam session, making musical instruments out of wood; the "Master Carve" leaves the competitors spinning as they create fantastical carousel animals ready to ride.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: A yearling escapes from the shelter while Tanja is out on a remote release.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: The three rowdiest yearlings must be trapped; a second moose calf arrives with injuries identical to the one that just passed.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: For the first time in 10 years, Taronga vets get up close to a silverback gorilla.

programme.title: Timber Titans
programme.desc: Heli-loggers are deep into their winter season on Vancouver Island; rain and fog threaten to strand two fallers on the hill; a crew races to get the wood out before the spring thaw turns the block road to mush.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: In Sheepyards, NSW, the Bushmen are desperate for a breakthrough after a run of bad luck.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: In Mintabie, the pressure mounts for The Tunnel Rats as rival miners move in on their area; in Sheepyards, The Bushmen are forced to enter an abandoned mine to remove a dead animal; rookies The Poms search for a prize opal to begins their career.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: On the last day, the fleet battles the bar and each other in search of the winning fish.
